GoHighLevel · Calendar Drill-Down · —

Every booked meeting · who they are · where they live in the pipeline.

Drills every calendar over a 2-year window through every event to unique booked contacts, joined to opportunities to show pipeline stage, tags, custom fields, and notes per booking. Click any calendar to filter, any row to open the full contact profile.
